name: Newapi
tagline: The next-generation LLM gateway and AI asset management system supports multiple languages.
description:
The next-generation LLM gateway and AI asset management system supports multiple languages.

Docs: https://docs.newapi.pro/en/getting-started/?utm_source=coolify.io

_Template derived from coollabsio/coolify (coolify@e7dff30, Apache-2.0). Default credentials are generated per-app — check the compose environment values._
docker_compose:
services:
  new-api:
    image: calciumion/new-api:v0.9.2.0
    depends_on:
      postgresql:
        condition: service_healthy
      redis:
        condition: service_healthy
    environment:
      - SQL_DSN=postgres://u74a502a352:c81676666b389a0b80a7d8faf3b0cdd0@postgresql:5432/${POSTGRES_DATABASE:-newapi}?sslmode=disable&TimeZone=${TZ:-Asia/Shanghai}
      - REDIS_CONN_STRING=redis://redis:6379
      - TZ=${TZ:-Asia/Shanghai}
      - SESSION_SECRET=YmIwMmZiODMzN2QwZGI4MmY4OGI2MmQ0
      - ERROR_LOG_ENABLED=${ERROR_LOG_ENABLED:-true}
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD-SHELL
        - 'wget -q -O - http://localhost:3000/api/status | grep -o ''"success":\s*true'' | awk -F: ''{print $2}'''
      interval: 30s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 3
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - 42071:3000
  postgresql:
    image: postgres:16-alpine
    environment:
      - POSTGRES_USER=u74a502a352
      - POSTGRES_PASSWORD=c81676666b389a0b80a7d8faf3b0cdd0
      - POSTGRES_DB=${POSTGRES_DATABASE:-newapi}
    volumes:
      - postgresql-data:/var/lib/postgresql/data
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD-SHELL
        - pg_isready -U $${POSTGRES_USER:-livea21c6a0} -d $${POSTGRES_DB:-newapi}
      interval: 5s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 20
    restart: unless-stopped
  redis:
    image: redis:7-alpine
    volumes:
      - redis-data:/data
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD
        - redis-cli
        - PING
      interval: 5s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 20
    restart: unless-stopped
volumes:
  postgresql-data: null
  redis-data: null
